title.zh: 他们说的，是最好的证明

subtitle.zh: 来自全球街头品牌买家的真实穿搭视频与成衣评价，见证 Kellogg Fashion 的制造品质。
subtitle.en: Real try-on videos and honest reviews from global streetwear brand buyers — witness Kellogg Fashion quality firsthand.

title.zh: 准备好定制您的专属产品了吗？
title.en: Ready to Create Your Custom Line?

subtitle.zh: 加入来自美国、英国、澳大利亚的品牌客户，体验 Kellogg Fashion 的品质服务。
subtitle.en: Join brand buyers from the US, UK, and Australia. Experience Kellogg Fashion quality.
